name: Nexaweb Delivers Industry's First Universal Client Framework with New Nexaweb Enterprise Web 2.0 Platform
description: Nexaweb press release at AJAX World Santa Clara (October 2006) announcing the Universal Client Framework (UCF) — a zero-install framework letting developers target Ajax or Java clients interchangeably on the same codebase. Peter S. Kastner (VP research director, IT, Aberdeen Group) characterizes this as a monumental application-development and modernization movement driven by users demanding richer experiences and enterprises under pressure to extend legacy app life via Web migration.
